project.name: E-commerce Platform

tasks.title: Setup development environment

tasks.description: Review coding standards, PR process, and deployment workflows.

subtasks.title: Read coding standards section
subtasks.description: Review the team's coding standards and style guide.

subtasks.description: Understand the pull request workflow and review guidelines.

subtasks.title: Read official docs
subtasks.description: Read the official React documentation from react.dev.

subtasks.title: Finish Scrimba course
subtasks.description: Complete the free React course on Scrimba.

subtasks.title: Build mini project
subtasks.description: Build a small React app to solidify the fundamentals.

tasks.title: Complete first PR
tasks.description: Pick a good first issue and submit your first pull request.

tasks.title: Sign contract
tasks.description: Review and sign the contract and NDA.
